turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi! I want to book a vaccination slot — for meningitis. I'm going abroad for studies soon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Congratulations on going abroad! Yes, we do administer travel vaccines including meningitis. Your name and travel date?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Nishant Goswami. I leave in 6 weeks. 9765001234.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good timing — 6 weeks is fine for this vaccine. We have a travel vaccination slot this Friday morning at 10 AM. Shall I book it?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes please! Do I need to bring anything?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just your passport copy and your university acceptance letter if available. Booked for Nishant Goswami, Friday 10 AM. Have a great time abroad!
